prompt:
Goal: Create a square fashion sale poster for a women's apparel campaign, elegant and minimalist, featuring BIG SALE and WOMEN'S SPECIAL SELECTION.

Canvas: 1:1 square social media ad, 768x768 style composition, warm neutral palette with cream concrete, taupe stone, and medium brown wood. Premium editorial fashion look, realistic photography with subtle graphic overlay.

Layout: Left half is the typography area, right half and lower area contain the fashion models. Place the large main title on the upper-left in burnt orange, all caps, modern geometric sans-serif, split over two lines as “BIG” above “SALE”. Below it place the subtitle in smaller black uppercase letters. Below that add a Japanese copy line: 夏まで着回せる、厳選アイテム. In the lower-left place a thin gold outlined discount box reading “MAX” above “60%OFF”, with “60” large, and a smaller gold bordered label below reading 数量限定・期間限定. At the bottom center place the brand text EHOU'S WARDROBE in spaced white uppercase letters.

Subjects: Include exactly 5 adult women in muted natural fashion, arranged like an editorial group shot. 1) Top-right standing woman in a long olive-beige trench coat over a white outfit, posed against a vertical wooden wall panel. 2) Center-right standing woman wearing a blue denim jacket over a white shirt and high-waisted black wide-leg trousers, one hand in pocket. 3) Far-right seated woman in an oversized ivory sweater, sitting on a pale cube block and turned slightly sideways. 4) Lower-left seated woman wearing a mustard yellow sleeveless maxi dress, sitting on a low stone block with sandals and a woven brown bag. 5) Lower-center seated/back-facing woman in a beige knit top and cream pants with a light beige backpack, sitting on a block facing away in three-quarter view. Faces should be softly anonymized or not emphasized; focus on clothing and silhouettes.

Background and graphic details: Use a refined showroom-like setting with off-white plaster/concrete wall on the left, wooden panel on the right, and pale stone blocks as seating platforms. Add thin black geometric line rectangles in the corners and background, including top-left, top-center/right, top-right, bottom-left, and bottom-right, as decorative architectural outlines. Lighting is soft, diffused, high-end catalog photography, with gentle shadows and no harsh contrast.

Constraints: Keep all visible text crisp and correctly spelled, especially Japanese text. Use exactly 5 women and exactly these main text groups: main title, subtitle, Japanese tagline, discount box, limited-offer label, and bottom brand name. Do not add extra logos, watermarks, prices, QR codes, or unrelated text.
